'''Narbuj Desilijic Preor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crimelord who once employed [[Stormtrooper X]] as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]].

==Biography==
When spice and credits were missing, Narbuj believed that Stormtrooper X was the culprit. Narbuj posted a large bounty for the capture of the rogue [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]].<ref name="Bounties" />

{{Char-stub}}
